training_status: Zone 2/Zone 3 cardio, slow walking with inclines

benefits.description: Reduced food noise, excellent appetite control, portion sizes came down considerably, full signal fires earlier
Lost 18 lbs total. Body fat went from 25.6% to 15.9%. Noticeable fat loss in face, gut, hips, and buttocks. Muscle mass remained stable on scale.

protocol_notes: Height 5'9". Started with 0.5 mg weekly for ~4 weeks, then switched to 1.0 mg weekly. Eating 2 meals/day initially, then dropped to 1 meal/day in 1-hour eating window. Diet consisted mainly of healthy proteins, carbs, and occasional frozen treats. Previous weight loss attempts on South Beach, Keto, and Carnivore diets resulted in weight regain. User tracked dosing and weight with Shotsy app (free version). Previously tried Semaglutide which affected libido negatively. No reported side effects from Retatrutide.
